name: bilig
description: Local-first spreadsheet engine monorepo with React playground, custom reconciler, and AssemblyScript/WASM fast path.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bilig/protocol build && pnpm --filter @bilig/formula build && pnpm --filter @bilig/crdt build && pnpm --filter @bilig/wasm-kernel build && pnpm --filter @bilig/core build && pnpm --filter @bilig/benchmarks build && pnpm --filter @bilig/playground build
scripts.ci: pnpm wasm:build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm bench:smoke && pnpm --filter @bilig/playground build
